applications.name: lammermuirs-southside
applications.address: Clawbare, near Longformacus, between Longformacus and Westruther
reasons: ~225MW campus in a Special Landscape Area
greenfield moorland — wildlife, dark skies, hill farming
industrialisation of a treasured rural landscape
applications.curatedNote: Roxburghe Estates / Sunlaws Development Company's £2bn proposal. Pre-application stage; a formal application to Scottish Borders Council is expected later in 2026. Now is the time to be heard.

applications.name: auchtertool-cato
applications.address: Land north-west of Auchtertool, near Burntisland, Fife
reasons: 600MW hyperscale — campaigners estimate ~20% of Scotland's energy
greenfield site, six 35m buildings dwarfing the village
planned over a 16th-century castle ruin and a wildlife site

petition.label: Sign: Stop the Auchtertool data centre

applications.curatedNote: ILI Group's £5bn proposal, first of their planned 'Stoics' network. Live application at Fife Council — the public has a short window to comment. The first Scottish AI data centre to reach this stage (Edinburgh South Gyle) was rejected.
